itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Stone_Axe-Description", "A roughly-made axe, but fells trees well enough.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Stone_Axe-FlavorText", "The first step on a path that leads back to the 22nd century.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Stone_Pickaxe-Description", "Break rocks with stone.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Stone_Pickaxe-FlavorText", "The soft sedimentary rock scattered across Icarus\'s surface is easily shaped into useful tools. They may not be durable, but can be repaired easily enough.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Wood_Spear-Description", "Simple to make, easy to break.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Wood_Spear-FlavorText", "An effective defensive weapon, and erratic low range projectile, rapidly surpassed by improved versions.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Wood_Bow-Description", "A primitive bow with limited range and durability.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Wood_Bow-FlavorText", "A more rudimentary bow is hard to imagine, but will prove lethal in steady, patient hands.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Stone_Knife-Description", "A basic hunting tool, strong and sharp enough ... just.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Stone_Knife-FlavorText", "Icarus\'s unusually active tectonics provide a ready source of sedimentary rocks, making for easily knapped, sharp, but weak blades.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Wood_Flare-Description", "A longer burning source of light in the darkness.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Wood_Flare-FlavorText", "\'One thing about wearing a helmet, you don\'t notice your shack smells like Satan\'s armpit.\' ~ Sol Berlinski. (Activate with secondary attack.)")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Campfire-Description", "A place to cook food and fend the cold away.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Campfire-FlavorText", "One of the simplest sources of heat available on Icarus, the campfire burns sticks and wood to cook basic foods. Toxins in the planet\'s atmosphere do not interfere with combustion.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Wood_Crate_Small-Description", "A modest wooden crate for storing small items.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Wood_Crate_Small-FlavorText", "Has 10 storage slots.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Bed_Bedroll-Description", "Once placed in shelter, a bed can be set as a respawn location. Can also be used to sleep through the night.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Bed_Bedroll-FlavorText", "\'A bed is where the soul returns after a night\'s travelling\' ~ Russian folk saying")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Bone_Spear-Description", "A bone blade improves melee damage.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Bone_Spear-FlavorText", "As most new arrivals on Icarus realise at some stage, there is a certain elegance to hunting an animal for its bones, in order to craft a more effective weapon to hunt further animals.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Stone_Arrow-Description", "The most basic version of an ancient weapon.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Stone_Arrow-FlavorText", "Attempts to redesign the planet failed, but the terrazone nonetheless has a ready supply of raw ingredients for this \'rock on a stick\'.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Bone_Arrow-Description", "A primitive arrow, dealing greater damage than stone.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Bone_Arrow-FlavorText", "In the mid-22nd century, the fletchers art is being rediscovered on Icarus.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Flare_Arrow-Description", "Projects your position into the sky.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Flare_Arrow-FlavorText", "The lost among us lean heavily on this launchable marker.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Fire_Arrow-Description", "Share the warmth.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Fire_Arrow-FlavorText", "\'One of the good things about being this far from Earth, there\'s no-one to tell you not to play with fire.\' - Sol Berlinski")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Bone_Knife-Description", "Stronger, lighter and sharper than its stone cousin. ")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Bone_Knife-FlavorText", "Did any UDA xenobiologist ever foresee that the bones of animals they adapted for life on Icarus would one day be used to fashion rudimentary hunting weapons?")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Wood_Rag_Torch-Description", "An easily crafted source of illumination.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Wood_Rag_Torch-FlavorText", "An ancient guiding light has found its place on Icarus, to keep the darkness at bay.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Kit_Floor_Torch-Description", "A free-standing torch requiring sticks for fuel.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Kit_Floor_Torch-FlavorText", "Oxygen levels may be a little lower, but fire provides light well enough.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Wood_Crate_Medium-Description", "Store, share and protect items and resources.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Wood_Crate_Medium-FlavorText", "Has 20 storage slots.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_FireWhacker-Description", "Quickly beats out fires.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_FireWhacker-FlavorText", "Discovered in prehistory, the fire whacker represents an effective, if unsophisticated tactic: Attack the flames until they surrender.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Bandage_Basic-Description", "Cloth bandages to stem bleeding and heal minor wounds.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Bandage_Basic-FlavorText", "The healing won\'t start until the bleeding stops.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_ResourceStack_Wood-Description", "Stack and store wood.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_ResourceStack_Stone-Description", "A pile of stones.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_ResourceStack_Stone-FlavorText", "A time honored solution for storing rubble, stone and debris.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Character_Crafting-Description", "Unlocks crafting.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Building_RepairTool-Description", "Maintain or upgrade your structures against the wrath of Icarus.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Building_RepairTool-FlavorText", "Quickly beat dislodged planks back into place, or replace those planks with sturdier materials, a single hammer does it all!")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Kit_Basic_Oxite_Dissolver-Description", "A simple device for processing oxite into oxygen.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Kit_Basic_Oxite_Dissolver-FlavorText", "The oxidizer is a slow, unpowered device that uses mechanical pressure to crush oxite, then store the resulting oxygen. Once the balloon begins to fill, consume oxygen from it directly.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Bandage_Heat-Description", "Cloth bandages impregnated with a warming salve, for treating frosty and frostbite.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Poison_Arrow-Description", "Slow death, with a point.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Poison_Arrow-FlavorText", "Requiring less accuracy, but more patience, the poison arrow brings down quarry slowly, but surely.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Suture_Kit-Description", "A basic medical kit for healing deep wounds.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Suture_Kit-FlavorText", "Whether lightly or deeply wounded, \'Permit the pain to pass over you, and through you.\' - Bao Li Wei")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Antipoison_Paste-Description", "A basic toxicology and anti-venom kit to reduce the duration of poisoning.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Antipoison_Paste-FlavorText", "It\'s speculated that exotics may suffuse much of the plant life in the terrazone, imparting bioactive properties, though exactly what these are, whether they\'re safe, and exactly how it works ... at this stage, who knows?")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Antibiotic_Paste-Description", "Reduces the duration of food poisoning, and other low grade infections.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Antibiotic_Paste-FlavorText", "A natural antibacterial agent that diminishes the impact of afflictions such as infected wounds and cave sickness.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Antiparasitic_Paste-Description", "A medical preparation for reducing the duration of festering wounds, dysentry and other parasites.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Antiparasitic_Paste-FlavorText", "From the very first, newcomers to Icarus noted the medicinal and bioactive properties of Earth-type plants were significantly more intense.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Blood_Thinning_Paste-Description", "A folk remedy for diminishing the effects of concussions and contusions.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Blood_Thinning_Paste-FlavorText", "A very basic anticoagulant.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_FirePit-Description", "A large, stone-lined pit for swift cooking and heating.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_FirePit-FlavorText", "Flashroast a steak or an entire mammoth forequarter.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Bone_Sickle-Description", "Repurposed remains for easy reaping.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Bone_Sickle-FlavorText", "The falk or grasshook is a harvesting tool of old, a symbol of labor, and weapon of disgruntled serfdom.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Stick-Description", "Small branches, easily fashioned into basic tools.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Stick-FlavorText", "Whether making weapons or tools, a crafting bench or fuel, basic creation begins with the humble stick.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Rope-Description", "Remains one of humanity\'s greatest inventions.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Rope-FlavorText", "A central element in crafting various construction materials and equipment.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Splint-Description", "Heals a broken leg.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Drying_Rack-Description", "A rack for slowly drying various cuts of meat and curing leather.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Drying_Rack-FlavorText", "Jerky is always a winner")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Bandage_Cooling-Description", "A bandage with a soothing balm to quickly lower temperatures. Treats heatstroke and heat exhaustion.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Basic_Fishing_Rod-Description", "A basic fishing rod.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Basic_Fishing_Rod-FlavorText", "Gone Fishin\'")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Shield_Bone-Description", "This gruesome shield is a formidable barrier that will strike fear into the hearts of your enemies.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Shield_Bone-FlavorText", "With this in hand, you\'re ready for anything.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Stone_Shovel-Description", "Can be used to collect dirt and sand when digging, or shovel snow off your roof.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Stone_Shovel-FlavorText", "Shift snow, or bury a friend.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Seed_Pouch-Description", "A convenient 12 slot pouch for your seeds.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Seed_Pouch-FlavorText", "Right click to access the Pouch Inventory")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Dirt_Ramp-Description", "A simple dirt ramp that can serve as basic vertical travesal. Must be placed attached to the terrain.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Dirt_Ramp-FlavorText", "The most basic of construction")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Dirt_Frame-Description", "A simple block of dirt that can serve as the foundation of a structure. Must be placed attached to the terrain.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Dirt_Frame-FlavorText", "The most basic of construction")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Health_Remedy-Description", "Providing a small amount of health recovery.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Health_Remedy-FlavorText", "When it comes to survival, prospectors on Icarus try everything.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Stone_Cairn-Description", "A pile of stones, which can mark a significant location for a prospector.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Stone_Cairn-FlavorText", "What significance does this place hold?")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Dirt_Corner-Description", "A simple corner to help with foundation building.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Dirt_Corner-FlavorText", "The most basic of construction")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Seed_Extractor-Description", "A simple tool which grinds up fruit and vegetables and extracts their seeds.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Seed_Extractor-FlavorText", "An essential tool for Farmers.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Homestead_Retaining_Wall-Description", "Attaches to Dirt Foundation and Ramps to create a retaining wall.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Homestead_Retaining_Wall-FlavorText", "Home Sweet Home")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Fur_Stack-Description", "A neatly rolled stack containing 200 Fur. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Fur_Stack-FlavorText", "Fur remains an exceptional material, especially in the terrazone, where temperatures are significantly cooler.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Kit_Skinning_Bench-Description", "Fully processes animal carcasses for more resources.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Kit_Skinning_Bench-FlavorText", "As any hunter knows, preparing an animal can be a slow, messy, wasteful task. The right tools make all the difference.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Crafting_Bench-Description", "A sturdy construction bench, though useless without shelter.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Crafting_Bench-FlavorText", "A heavy woodworking table that enables construction of improved tools, weapons and structural elements.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Carpentry_Bench-Description", "Workbench and tools for advanced wooden crafting.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Carpentry_Bench-FlavorText", "The rapid growth of trees on Icarus makes for noticeably less durable wooden creations.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Flint_Arrow-Description", "Flies further, hits harder than stone or bone.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Flint_Arrow-FlavorText", "Knappable flint provides a sharper arrowhead and greater penetration than stone or bone.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Steel_Arrow-Description", "A stronger arrow head, more durable than flint.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Steel_Arrow-FlavorText", "Tempered and fletched, the steel arrow has significant upsides over comparable alternatives.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Oxygen_Bladder-Description", "A simple airtight vessel for storing extra oxygen.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Oxygen_Bladder-FlavorText", "\'The Icarus nang.\' - Prospector joke")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Waterskin-Description", "A basic water bladder.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Waterskin-FlavorText", "The waterskin\'s rough construction allows for rapid crafting, perfect for basic survival needs.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Metal_Axe-Description", "An iron axe, for swifter felling and hewing.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Metal_Axe-FlavorText", "\'Technological progress is like an axe in the hands of a pathological criminal.\' -- Albert Einstein")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Metal_Pickaxe-Description", "A strong iron pickaxe, for more rapid, reliable mining of basic stone.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Metal_Pickaxe-FlavorText", "An enduring if ironic icon of the so-called \'Exotics Rush\'.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Metal_Spear-Description", "An iron spearhead, improving defensive power and range.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Metal_Spear-FlavorText", "\'I throw a spear into the darkness. That is intuition. Then I must send an army into the darkness to find the spear. That is intellect.\' -- Ingmar Bergman")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Longbow-Description", "A powerful, but heavy long-range weapon.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Longbow-FlavorText", "Xeno-biologists hurriedly altered the genes of the tree from which this weapon is made, so that it might thrive on Icarus, never imagining that one day, a bow would be fashioned from it.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Lantern-Description", "A portable, animal-fat-powered light, can be refilled on crafting bench.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Lantern-FlavorText", "Fear not the dark.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Crossbow-Description", "Heavy hitting with a slow reload, so make it count.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Crossbow-FlavorText", "\'The first time I held a crossbow, I was confused. How can you feel powerful and so medieval at the same time?\' -- Anton Chang")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Metal_Bolt-Description", "A hard-hitting iron bolt, trading distance for damage.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Metal_Bolt-FlavorText", "Roughly 64,000 years since its first invention, the essential form of the bolt remains unchanged.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Copper_Bolt-Description", "Lightweight and strong, the copper bolt hits hard over distance.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Metal_Knife-Description", "A short, clip-point blade for better defense and swifter skinning.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Metal_Knife-FlavorText", "\'A mind all logic is like a knife all blade. It makes the hand bleed that uses it.\' -- Rabindranath Tagore")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Cooking_Station_V2-Description", "A food preparation and butchering bench.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Cooking_Station_V2-FlavorText", "While it may not deliver high cuisine, the Cooking Station rewards the attentions of an attentive chef with a swifter, more sustaining food supply.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Kit_Mortar_And_Pestle-Description", "A simple tool for crafting resins, pastes, medicines and more.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Kit_Mortar_And_Pestle-FlavorText", "The tool of chefs, herbalists, apothecaries and alchemists.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Kit_Stone_Furnace-Description", "A simple stone furnace for smelting iron, copper and steel.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Kit_Stone_Furnace-FlavorText", "Bronze-age technology, spread to the stars.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Kit_Oxite_Dissolver-Description", "A more efficient oxidizer for processing oxite into oxygen.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Kit_Oxite_Dissolver-FlavorText", "Place oxite and an appropriate container into the dissolver to start filling it. Requires sulfur for fuel.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Epoxy-Description", "A basic but strong and hard-setting organic polymer.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Epoxy-FlavorText", "UDA safety guidelines recommend not breathing in the fumes.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Carbon_Paste-Description", "A carbon-based admixture used in advanced constructions.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Carbon_Paste-FlavorText", "Don\'t leave Earth without it.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Bed_Interior_Wood-Description", "Once placed in shelter, a bed can be set as a respawn location. Can also be used to sleep through the night.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Bed_Interior_Wood-FlavorText", "A solidly made, simple place to rest and restore energy")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Flour-Description", "Ground wheat, ready for cooking.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Sickle-Description", "An ancient, but efficient tool for harvesting from nature.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Sickle-FlavorText", "Delivers more resources with each swipe.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Farming_CropPlot_T2-Description", "A general-purpose planter bed for your crops. Fully-grown crops left too long will eventually wither and only provide spoiled plants.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Farming_CropPlot_T2-FlavorText", "A raised planting bed brings the food to you, slowly.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Kit_Wall_Torch-Description", "A mounted flame for adorning shelter walls.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Kit_Wall_Torch-FlavorText", "Lower oxygen levels produce a dirty, but workable flame.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Table_Wood-Description", "A wooden table, like so many before it.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Table_Wood-FlavorText", "It\'s possible that the entirety of human culture can be extrapolated from the existence of tables.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Shovel-Description", "Can be used to collect dirt and sand when digging, or shovel snow off your roof.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Shovel-FlavorText", "Shift snow, or bury a friend.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Fireplace-Description", "Cooks food swiftly and safely. Basically a large enclosed firepit, for a more homely feel.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Fireplace-FlavorText", "On Icarus, fire is both friend and foe.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Wood_Sign_Small-Description", "Places writeable signage.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Dough_Flatbread-Description", "Makes flatbread, just add to a fire.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Dough_Flatbread-FlavorText", "Lightyears from the Levant.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Brazier-Description", "An easily crafted, open source of light.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_PotBellyStove-Description", "A wrought iron stove for cooking basic meals.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_PotBellyStove-FlavorText", "Hearty and filling, the warm meals provided by this stove are the next steps towards culinary perfection.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Wood_Hedgehog_Medium-Description", "A medium sized hedgehog-style defensive structure.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Wood_Hedgehog_Medium-FlavorText", "Hedgehogs may have been left on Earth but the lessons they tought will serve us well on Icarus.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Rain_Reservoir-Description", "A simple and durable way to collect rain water.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Rain_Reservoir-FlavorText", "Water can be consumed directly from the reservoir, or it will refill an equipped container.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Armor_Bench-Description", "Craft and assemble various protective items and garments.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Armor_Bench-FlavorText", "Basic fabric, leatherwork and armorer\'s tools allow you to fashion a range of clothing and protective wear from natural materials and fibers.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Masonry_Bench-Description", "Tools for working and shaping stone.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Masonry_Bench-FlavorText", "The art of stonework is untouched by the distance between worlds.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Interior_Wood_Crate_Small-Description", "A small storage unit for items.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Interior_Wood_Crate_Small-FlavorText", "Has 10 storage slots.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Interior_Wood_Crate_Medium-Description", "A storage unit for items and gear.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Interior_Wood_Crate_Medium-FlavorText", "Has 20 storage slots.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Herbalism_Bench-Description", "Craft, create, concoct.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Herbalism_Bench-FlavorText", "Once the realm of witches and shaman, herbalism offers useful wisdom to those who can discern basic science from hocus pocus.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Trophy_Bench-Description", "Taxidermy tools and mounting equipment.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Trophy_Bench-FlavorText", "Make a record of your victories, because planet is barely aware of you.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Taxidermy_Knife-Description", "A small, strong precision cutting tool.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Taxidermy_Knife-FlavorText", "Perfect for precise cuts to preserve that \'still breathing\' look.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Health_Enhancement_Tonic-Description", "Providing a decent amount of health recovery.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Health_Enhancement_Tonic-FlavorText", "When it comes to survival, prospectors on Icarus try everything.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Sustenence_Enhancement_Tonic-Description", "Providing a large amount of food, water and oxygen, and reducing their consumption for a short time.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Sustenence_Enhancement_Tonic-FlavorText", "Perfect for the prospector on the go.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Strength_Enhancement_Tonic-Description", "Provides a large boost to melee damage, throwing speed and physical resistance, for a short time.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Strength_Enhancement_Tonic-FlavorText", "For when you want to get up close and personal.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Stamina_Enhancement_Tonic-Description", "Providing a large amount of stamina and boosting maximum stamina and stamina regen for a short time.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Stamina_Enhancement_Tonic-FlavorText", "Like the energy drinks of old, sometimes you need a little pick me up.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_IceBox-Description", "Stores food at low temperatures when supplied with ice.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_IceBox-FlavorText", "The insulated icebox arrests food decay, as well as slowing the melting of ice itself. Has 10 storage slots.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Poison_Paste-Description", "A slow-working toxin made from spoiled meat. ")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Poison_Paste-FlavorText", "\'Life is a slow working poison\' - Jean Hurvit")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Anvil_Bench-Description", "Heavyweight work surface for iron and steel tools, using ingots smelted in their appropriate furnaces.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Anvil_Bench-FlavorText", "Arguably the simplest fabrication system known to humanity.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Steel_Bloom-Description", "A precursor mixture of iron ore and coal, smelted in a concrete furnace to create steel.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Steel_Bloom-FlavorText", "The conditions on Icarus give its would-be metallurgists very little control over the finer details of steel smelting. A basic bloomery process prevails.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Steel_Axe-Description", "A steel axe, for swifter felling and hewing.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Steel_Axe-FlavorText", "Steel of this quality would be an embarrassment to any industry on Earth, but on Icarus remains a minor miracle.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Steel_Spear-Description", "A light, strong traditional spear design that holds its edge.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Steel_Spear-FlavorText", "The word \'spear\' has descended to us through the ages largely unchanged.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Steel_Knife-Description", "A tempered needlepoint hunting blade.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Steel_Knife-FlavorText", "Finely balanced knives like this can be thrown accurately with a little practice.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Steel_Pickaxe-Description", "Tempered steel, suitable for even the toughest of metals.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Steel_Pickaxe-FlavorText", "When first landing on Icarus prospectors quickly discovered the need for stronger metals to deal with the local ore.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Steel_Bolt-Description", "A hard-hitting steel bolt, trading distance for damage.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Steel_Bolt-FlavorText", "Roughly 64,000 years since its first invention, the essential form of the bolt remains unchanged.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Chair_Wood-Description", "A robust, rustic wooden seat.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Chair_Wood-FlavorText", "Driven by the demands and scarcity of life on the surface, a recognizable \'Icarus vernacular\' has swiftly emerged, spanning many forms of design, with furniture being no exception.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Crushed_Bone-Description", "A calcium-rich powder.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Crushed_Bone-FlavorText", "Highly ground bone creates a useful ingredient for a range of concoctions.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Iron_Hammer-Description", "Maintain structures against the wrath of Icarus.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Iron_Hammer-FlavorText", "Counter the forces of nature with a little violence of your own.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Steel_Hammer-Description", "The most efficient tool for repairing damaged structures.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Steel_Hammer-FlavorText", "The tidal forces of Minos produce exceptionally violent weather on Icarus, its largest moon, which in turn damages even the most robust construction. A steel hammer can even the odds ... a little.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Antipoison_Tonic-Description", "Fast-working anti-venom to combat poisoning.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Antipoison_Tonic-FlavorText", "Of the many ways to die on Icarus, poisoning is perhaps the least glorious.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Antibiotic_Tonic-Description", "An antibacterial distillation that cures food poisoning, wound infections and afflictions like cave sickness.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Antibiotic_Tonic-FlavorText", "The interaction between bioactive substances and microbial life here on Icarus is still poorly understood, especially when one factors in the effects of exotic matter to both.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Antiparasitic_Tonic-Description", "A medicinal preparation for curing festering wounds, dysentry and other parasites.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Antiparasitic_Tonic-FlavorText", "From suppurating wounds to dysentery, this natural broad-spectrum antibiotic remedy cures it all.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Blood_Thinning_Tonic-Description", "An effective remedy for relieving concussions and contusions.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Blood_Thinning_Tonic-FlavorText", "Voyagers to Icarus have found themselves forced to ressurect a range of folk treatments and traditional medicines.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_LightningRod_Basic-Description", "Channels lightning strikes safely toward the ground, saving structures from fiery destruction.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_LightningRod_Basic-FlavorText", "The effect of Minos\'s gravitational tides on the atmosphere creates extraordinarily powerful electrical storms, making these devices indispensible.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Pistol_Handgun-Description", "A serviceable handgun.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Pistol_Handgun-FlavorText", "Icarus is open carry.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Mesh_Backpack-Description", "A tough leather backpack that increases inventory space, carry weight capacity and reduces the weight of ore.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Mesh_Backpack-FlavorText", "Sol Berlinski, now Lagos Unit dispatcher on Ceres Station, claims the design of the \'quietly iconic\' prospector\'s basic backpack was taught to him personally by Mo Chou.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Composter_Wood-Description", "Change your trash into Fertilizer with this simple composter. Items placed in this device will spoil at an accelerated rate.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Composter_Wood-FlavorText", "Reduce, reuse, recycle")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Rustic_Cosmetics_Bench-Description", "A bench for crafting decorations from a range of tech levels.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Rustic_Cosmetics_Bench-FlavorText", "Pick up a new hobby, today!")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Metal_Sledgehammer-Description", "Very heavy weapon that can be used to break rocks like Scoria and Obsidian.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Metal_Sledgehammer-FlavorText", "Can deal a lot of damage")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Mission_Device-Description", "Certified Online Network Transmitter for Contractor Tasking. Allows contact to Orbital station SMPL3 Missions and Operations.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Mission_Device-FlavorText", "Replacing UDA agents one mission at a time.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Animal_Bed-Description", "Juvenile animals can use this as a designated sleeping spot")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Water_Trough-Description", "A simple, fillable trough to provide water for tamed creatures. Use a water container to fill, or let nature do its thing when it rains.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Water_Trough-FlavorText", "Hydration is key.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Saddle_Standard_Bag-Description", "Place this harness inside a tamed Buffalo or Tusker\'s inventory to increase it\'s carrying capacity. This harness cannot be used as a seat by players.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Saddle_Standard_Bag-FlavorText", "Lending a helping hand, or hoof.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Food_Trough-Description", "A basic trough to provide food for juvenile and tamed creatures. Accepts most fresh fruits and vegetables.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Food_Trough-FlavorText", "Essential for a happy creature.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Saddle_Standard-Description", "Place this saddle inside a tamed creature\'s inventory to allow it to become rideable")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Saddle_Standard-FlavorText", "Feel the wind in your hair.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Fortification_Wood_Wall-Description", "A large, strong wood wall fortification.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Fortification_Wood_Wall-FlavorText", "Claim your territory through the wonders of construction.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Fortification_Wood_Gate-Description", "A large, strong wood gate fortification which can be opened and closed.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Fortification_Wood_Gate-FlavorText", "From safety to wilderness, an entryway to the danger of Icarus.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Fortification_Wood_Walkway-Description", "A walkway and ramp set for the wood fortification walls.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Fortification_Wood_Walkway-FlavorText", "A protected vantage point to survey the nearby area.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Fortification_Wood_Spikes-Description", "A large collection of spiked defenses which can be mounted to fortification walls.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Fortification_Wood_Spikes-FlavorText", "An extra layer of defense, prevents wildlife from working their way through your walls. ")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_WaterBomb-Description", "A thrown device for fire fighting.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_WaterBomb-FlavorText", "Woven from fiber, the water bomb allows fire suppression from a safe distance.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Exotic_Delivery_Interface-Description", "Allows you to order a Delivery Pod for Exotic Retrieval")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Exotic_Delivery_Interface-FlavorText", "Part of the Icarus Orbital Exchange System developed by Sinotai.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Saddle_Cart_Wood-Description", "Place this cart inside a tamed Buffalo or Tusker\'s inventory to greatly increase its carrying capacity.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Saddle_Cart_Wood-FlavorText", "Lending a helping hand, or hoof.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Shield_Wooden-Description", "A rudimentary shield that can be used to block incoming attacks.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Shield_Wooden-FlavorText", "Simple, but effective.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Fishing_Bench-Description", "A place to craft Rods and Lures and to fillet Fish that you\'ve caught.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Fishing_Bench-FlavorText", "The stench of this bench...")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Basic_Fishing_Trap-Description", "A simple trap that can catch Basic Low Quality Fish")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Basic_Fishing_Trap-FlavorText", "Set and forget.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Wooden_Fishing_Rod-Description", "A sturdy fishing rod.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Wooden_Fishing_Rod-FlavorText", "Gone Fishin\'")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Advanced_Fishing_Trap-Description", "An advanced trap that can catch all types of fish.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Advanced_Fishing_Trap-FlavorText", "True ingenuity.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Fish_Wall_Mount-Description", "You may display your favourite catch here for all to see.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Fish_Wall_Mount-FlavorText", "If only it could sing.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Salting_Station-Description", "Can be used to preserve food, using salt.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Salting_Station-FlavorText", "Simple but effective")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Refined_Wood_Fishing_Rod-Description", "A lightweight and reliable fishing rod.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Refined_Wood_Fishing_Rod-FlavorText", "Gone Fishin\'")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Volatile_Substance-Description", "A highly explosive substance made from locally found materials native to Icarus.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Volatile_Substance-FlavorText", "This feels like it could explode at any point.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Shield_Steel-Description", "A sturdy shield made of durable steel, providing reliable protection against threats.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Shield_Steel-FlavorText", "With this in hand, you\'re ready for anything.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Spawn_Blocker_T2-Description", "A handy item that creates a zone of protection, reducing the likelihood of creatures within its small radius. Requires Spoiled Meat to Function.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Spawn_Blocker_T2-FlavorText", "Note to self: Does not stop bears chasing you...")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Tackle_Box-Description", "A place to store your Fishing Lures and latest catch.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Tackle_Box-FlavorText", "A fisherman\'s best friend.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Obsidian_Knife-Description", "A lightweight knife created with a sharpened blade of Obsidian. Gives a chance for food to be instantly cooked when skinning.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Obsidian_Knife-FlavorText", "Made using volcanic glass created from the bowels of the planet, that has cooled rapidly with minimal crystal growth.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Obsidian_Spear-Description", "A lightweight spear created with a sharpened point of Obsidian.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Obsidian_Spear-FlavorText", "Made using volcanic glass created from the bowels of the planet, that has cooled rapidly with minimal crystal growth.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Obsidian_Axe-Description", "A lightweight Axe created with a sharpened head of Obsidian. Gives a chance to collect coal from trees.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Obsidian_Axe-FlavorText", "Made using volcanic glass created from the bowels of the planet, that has cooled rapidly with minimal crystal growth.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Obsidian_Pickaxe-Description", "A lightweight Pickaxe created with a sharpened point of Obsidian. Gives a chance to instantly smelt ore when mining.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Obsidian_Pickaxe-FlavorText", "Made using volcanic glass created from the bowels of the planet, that has cooled rapidly with minimal crystal growth.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Obsidian_Sledgehammer-Description", "A lightweight hammer created with a blunted block of Obsidian. Gives a chance to instantly smelt ore when mining.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Obsidian_Sledgehammer-FlavorText", "Made using volcanic glass created from the bowels of the planet, that has cooled rapidly with minimal crystal growth.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Obsidian_Bolt-Description", "A lightweight bolt created with a sharpened point of Obsidian.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Obsidian_Bolt-FlavorText", "Made using volcanic glass created from the bowels of the planet, that has cooled rapidly with minimal crystal growth.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Obsidian_Arrow-Description", "A lightweight arrow created with a sharpened point of Obsidian.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Obsidian_Arrow-FlavorText", "Made using volcanic glass created from the bowels of the planet, that has cooled rapidly with minimal crystal growth.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Obsidian_Sickle-Description", "A lightweight sickle created with a sharpened blade of Obsidian. Gives a chance to cook veges when harvesting but may also produce spoiled plants.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Obsidian_Sickle-FlavorText", "Made using volcanic glass created from the bowels of the planet, that has cooled rapidly with minimal crystal growth.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Watering_Can-Description", "When used will water any crop plots or dirt mounds in a small area in front of you.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Watering_Can-FlavorText", "It\'s better to be a Prospector in a garden, than a Gardener in space.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Scorpion_FishingRod-Description", "An impressive fishing rod crafted from the spoils of defeating a Giant Scorpion.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Scorpion_FishingRod-FlavorText", "A weapon that was truly hard-won.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Scorpion_Crossbow-Description", "An impressive crossbow crafted from the spoils of defeating a Giant Scorpion.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Scorpion_Crossbow-FlavorText", "A weapon that was truly hard-won.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Crushed_Limestone-Description", "Limestone that has been crushed, ready for use.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Crushed_Limestone-FlavorText", "Back on Earth, Limestone as Calcium Carbonate is used in some medicines to soothe an upset stomach. Icarus Limestone is poisonous. Do NOT eat.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Beehive-Description", "A beehive that can be used to start your beekeeping journey.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Beehive-FlavorText", "The Bees of Icarus are known for their long, needle-like stingers which are capable of piercing even the toughest of envirosuits. Proceed with caution.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Beehive_Expansion-Description", "An expansion for your beehive that will increase its inventory space.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Beehive_Expansion-FlavorText", "The Bees of Icarus are known for their long, needle-like stingers which are capable of piercing even the toughest of envirosuits. Proceed with caution.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Beehive_BreedingCenter-Description", "A Breeding Center that attaches to a beehive that provides the facilities for a Queen Bee to produce Worker Bees.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Beehive_BreedingCenter-FlavorText", "The Bees of Icarus are known for their long, needle-like stingers which are capable of piercing even the toughest of envirosuits. Proceed with caution.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Beehive_Extractor-Description", "An extractor that attaches to a beehive that can process Honeycomb into Honey and Beeswax.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Beehive_Extractor-FlavorText", "The Bees of Icarus are known for their long, needle-like stingers which are capable of piercing even the toughest of envirosuits. Proceed with caution.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Beehive_Expansion2-Description", "An expansion for your beehive that will increase its inventory space even further.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Beehive_Expansion2-FlavorText", "The Bees of Icarus are known for their long, needle-like stingers which are capable of piercing even the toughest of envirosuits. Proceed with caution.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Stationeers_Bobblehead-Description", "A cute trophy showing off your love for Stationeers.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Stationeers_Bobblehead-FlavorText", "Not sure how you got the UDA to agree to delivering this...")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Food_Trough_Large-Description", "A basic wooden feeder that allows multiple creatures to eat from at once")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Food_Trough_Large-FlavorText", "Like the smaller one, only larger")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Water_Trough_Large-Description", "Allows multiple creatures to drink from at once and can be connected to a water network.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Water_Trough_Large-FlavorText", "Like the smaller one, only larger")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Food_Trough_T4-Description", "A feeder which can create different types of animal gruel depending on what is placed inside.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Food_Trough_T4-FlavorText", "Takes the pressure out of cooking.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Water_Trough_T4-Description", "When powered incoming water is filtered fresh for your animals to drink.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Water_Trough_T4-FlavorText", "Do the animals drink better than prospectors?")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Iron_Shears-Description", "Used to Shear Sheep and Collect its Wool")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Iron_Shears-FlavorText", "Just like they had in the old country.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Chicken_Coop-Description", "A place that chickens can go to feel safe, and lay eggs.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Chicken_Coop-FlavorText", "Built by your own hand, and it feels good.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Animal_Bench-Description", "Specialised bench for crafting saddles, troughs, carts and various feeds.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Animal_Bench-FlavorText", "Your one stop show for all your animal needs.")

Farming_Carts.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Talents", "Farming_Carts-Description", "A selection of carts used by large animals when farming.")

AnimalFeedPack.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Talents", "AnimalFeedPack-Description", "A set of animal feeds that provide buffs to your creatures.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Wood_Burner-Description", "For keeping you warm in cold environments and basic cooking.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Wood_Burner-FlavorText", "You\'re a true survivor now.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Medicine_Bag-Description", "A sturdy satchel which can carry all sorts of medical supplies. Allows instant use of medicine inside the bag.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Medicine_Bag-FlavorText", "You are a real doctor now.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Seed_Pouch_T2-Description", "A convenient 24 slot satchel for seeds and fertilizer.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Seed_Pouch_T2-FlavorText", "Right click to access the Satchel Inventory")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Quality_Fertilizer-Description", "Promotes recovery of Crop Quality while the Crop is Wet.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Quality_Fertilizer-FlavorText", "Reach for the sky")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Resistance_Fertilizer-Description", "Helps a Crop maintain its quality during storms.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Resistance_Fertilizer-FlavorText", "Reach for the sky")

Black_Wolf_Armor_Set.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Talents", "Black_Wolf_Armor_Set-Description", "A set of Black Wolf Armor.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Epoxy-Description", "A basic but strong and hard-setting organic polymer.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Epoxy-FlavorText", "UDA safety guidelines recommend not breathing in the fumes.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Ape_Tonic-Description", "A tonic that sends one into a frenzy ready to engage in fist to fist combat.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Ape_Tonic-FlavorText", "Use only in moderation.")

itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_IceMammoth_Shield-FlavorText", "A weapon that was truly hard-won.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_IceMammoth_Spear-Description", "An impressive spear crafted from the spoils of defeating a Rimetusk.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_IceMammoth_Spear-FlavorText", "A weapon that was truly hard-won.")

itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Ammo_Crude-FlavorText", "What\'s next? Firing gravel?")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Bucket-Description", "A bucket that can be filled with water.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Bucket-FlavorText", "Everyone should at least have one of these.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Ape_Fishing_Trap-Description", "A fishing trap crafted from the spoils of victory against a Garganutan.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Ape_Fishing_Trap-FlavorText", "An item that was truly hard-won.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Sugar-Description", "A handful of sweet sugar cubes.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Sugar-FlavorText", "Sweet As.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Milk_Bucket-Description", "A steel pail made for storing milk. Milk will spoil and the Pail will empty when this occurs.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Milk_Bucket-FlavorText", "A farmers friend.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Caveworm_Bow-Description", "A hard-won trophy turned into a weapon ")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Caveworm_Bow-FlavorText", "Still smells a little strange though")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Caveworm_Arrow-Description", "A rare and resilient projectile.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Caveworm_Arrow-FlavorText", "While the worms\' existence inside the terrazone is a mystery, their scales make extraordinarily practical blades")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Caveworm_Spear-Description", "A spear crafted from an ancient organism\'s armor.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Caveworm_Spear-FlavorText", "Many factions continue to research these worms, suspecting that subterranean evolution could hold clues to the bioeffects of exotics.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Caveworm_Knife-Description", "A rare, highly durable blade.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Caveworm_Knife-FlavorText", "Evolved to resist prolonged sand abrasion, the worm\'s chitin-analogue scales holds an excellent edge.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Scorpion_Trap_Medium-Description", "Similar to a bear trap, this is one device you do NOT want to stand on. Can be reset after activation.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Scorpion_Trap_Medium-FlavorText", "Be sure to give it a wide berth")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Scorpion_Hedgehog_Medium-Description", "A medium sized hedgehog-style defensive structure with poisonous stingers for extra damage.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Scorpion_Hedgehog_Medium-FlavorText", "How the tables have turned")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Seed_Fertilizer-Description", "Stimulates the Crop to Produce Seeds over Produce.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Seed_Fertilizer-FlavorText", "A farmers best friend.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Stone_Sign_Small-Description", "A stone sign to display information.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Armour_Stand-Description", "A nicely carved stand where armor can be displayed.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Armour_Stand-FlavorText", "Show off your armor or use it to quickly equip, up to you prospector.")

Animal_Baits.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Talents", "Animal_Baits-Description", "Draws in Creatures to the Area")

itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Saddle_Advanced_Arctic-FlavorText", "Feel the wind in your hair.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Flare_Gun-Description", "An Instrument which can be used to project your position into the sky.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Flare_Gun-FlavorText", "A key tool for scouting.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Fortification_Stone_Wall-Description", "A solid stone wall fortification.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Fortification_Stone_Wall-FlavorText", "Stronger than Wood.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Fortification_Stone_Walkway-Description", "A walkway and ramp set for the stone fortification walls.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Fortification_Stone_Walkway-FlavorText", "Stronger than Wood.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Fortification_Stone_Gate-Description", "A large, strong stone gate fortification which can be opened and closed.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Fortification_Stone_Gate-FlavorText", "Stronger than Wood.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Fortification_Stone_Spikes-Description", "Attachment for fortification walls that damage creatures who attack.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Fortification_Stone_Spikes-FlavorText", "Stronger than Wood.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Fortification_Stone_Platform-Description", "A wall attachment that allows you to look over the top of your wall safely.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Fortification_Stone_Platform-FlavorText", "Stronger than Wood.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Saddle_Raptor-Description", "Place this saddle inside a tamed creature\'s inventory to allow it to become rideable")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Saddle_Raptor-FlavorText", "Feel the wind in your hair.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_AntiRadiation_Tonic-Description", "Slowly Cleans Irradiated Blood and Stimulates The Repair of Cells")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_AntiRadiation_Tonic-FlavorText", "Survive the Fallout")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Saddle_Mammoth_Standard-Description", "Place this saddle inside a tamed creature\'s inventory to allow it to become rideable")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Saddle_Mammoth_Standard-FlavorText", "XL size")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Homestead_Spawn_Blocker_Scarecrow-Description", "A fiber filled Scarecrow, can be used to create a zone of protection, reducing the likelihood of creatures within its small radius. Requires Spoiled Meat to Function.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Homestead_Spawn_Blocker_Scarecrow-FlavorText", "Note to self: Does not stop bears chasing you...")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Homestead_Pitchfork-Description", "A farming tool which combines the functionality of a sickle with the stabbing of a spear.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Homestead_Pitchfork-FlavorText", "Pointy.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Homestead_Iron_Stove-Description", "An efficient, wood burning cooking unit.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Homestead_Iron_Stove-FlavorText", "Home Sweet Home")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Animal_Bed_Nesting-Description", "Can be used by animals to speed up the gestation process.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Animal_Bed_Nesting-FlavorText", "Nothing beats a soft fur bed.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Homestead_Ranch_Gate_Sign-Description", "A countryside-inspired decor feature that brings character to your home.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Homestead_Ranch_Gate_Sign-FlavorText", "Home Sweet Home")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Homestead_Ranch_Sign-Description", "A countryside-inspired decor feature that brings character to your home.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Homestead_Ranch_Sign-FlavorText", "Home Sweet Home")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Homestead_BarnDoor-Description", "A countryside-inspired decor feature that brings character to your home.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Homestead_BarnDoor-FlavorText", "Home Sweet Home")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Homestead_Barbed_Wire_Fence-Description", "A countryside-inspired decor feature that brings character to your home.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Homestead_Barbed_Wire_Fence-FlavorText", "Home Sweet Home")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Canteen-Description", "A small, lightly-insulated water bottle.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Oxygen_Tank-Description", "A small tank for storing and consuming oxygen.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Oxygen_Tank-FlavorText", "While plants and animals were genetically adjusted to deal with the impurities in Icarus\'s air, humans need to bring their own.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Kit_Machining_Bench-Description", "Upgrades your manufacturing abilities with basic machine tools.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Electronics-Description", "A modular control unit, adaptable to most I/Os.")

NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Composter-Description", "Rapidly decomposes organic matter into biofuel, which is collected by adding a biofuel can. Can be connected to a water network for increased processing speed.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Composter-FlavorText", "Requires a fuel can to be added to collect biofuel.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Aluminium_Arrow-Description", "A mid-grade, lightweight arrow giving decent range and damage.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Aluminium_Arrow-FlavorText", "Sharp, savage, slightly barbed.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Carbon_Arrow-Description", "Strength and lightness combined in one hard-hitting package.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Concrete_Furnace_V2-Description", "An insulated, high-temperature furnace for smelting a wide range of materials including steel.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Concrete_Furnace_V2-FlavorText", "Icarus\'s oxygen levels may slow combustion, but ceramic insulation produces temperatures sufficient for smelting more advanced alloys.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Binoculars-Description", "Simple to fabricate, 8x42 field glasses.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Carbon_Spear-Description", "A light, resilient spear made of layered carbon fiber.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Carbon_Spear-FlavorText", "Kills faster, lasts longer.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Recurve_Bow-Description", "With higher energy, recurve bows increase range and power.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Recurve_Bow-FlavorText", "Originating in ancient Scythia, the recurve bow stores energy more efficiently than a conventional bow, allowing for smaller, more compact weapons with an appreciable improvement in range and stopping power.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Frag_Grenade-Description", "A basic fragmentation grenade design.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Frag_Grenade-FlavorText", "Homemade explosives are the best kind.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Smoke_Grenade-Description", "A canister grenade, used for drawing attention or concealing.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Shotgun-Description", "The reliable and timeless pump-action, savage at short range.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Shotgun-FlavorText", "Ruin something\'s day, every day.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Shell_Buckshot-Description", "Standard 12 gauge \"00\" buckshot.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Biofuel_Lamp-Description", "A robust, portable biofuel-powered lamp.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Biofuel_Lamp-FlavorText", "Activate with secondary fire.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Rifle_Round-Description", "Standard NATO 7.62mm ammunition.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_FireExtinguisher-Description", "A canister of compressed flame-extinguishing liquid. Refill using water devices.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_FireExtinguisher-FlavorText", "The instructions say: \'Aim towards flame.\'")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Dough_Bread-Description", "Makes bread, just add to a fire.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Glass_Bottle-Description", "A large, empty glass bottle.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Glass_Bottle-FlavorText", "Looks perfectly capable of storing numerous liquids.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Thermos-Description", "Like a Canteen, but with better thermal protection")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Thermos-FlavorText", "The perfect temperature, every time.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Metal_Oxite_Dissolver-Description", "A faster and more efficient, biofuel-powered oxidizer with greater storage.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Cement_Mixer-Description", "Craft concrete construction elements.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Cement_Mixer-FlavorText", "Concrete is composed of two essential elements: aggregate and a cement binder, with ratios depending on the specific design mix. Specialized concrete engineers are rare on Icarus, though.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Metal_Crate_Small-Description", "Strong protective storage for items.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Metal_Crate_Small-FlavorText", "Has 15 storage slots.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Metal_Crate_Medium-Description", "A strong, generous storage unit.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Metal_Crate_Medium-FlavorText", "Has 25 storage slots.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Repair_Bench-Description", "Repairs any item, requiring power to repair tier 4 or workshop items.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Repair_Bench-FlavorText", "A little duct tape, maybe some lubricant, this bench can fix anything!")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Dehumidifier-Description", "Powerful, portable protection against the effects of being underground.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Dehumidifier-FlavorText", "Powered by charcoal, the dehumidifier heavily reduces bacterial growth in caves by reducing dampness.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Portable_Beacon-Description", "Displays a map marker when deployed. Prospectors can adjust the map markers icon and colour by interacting with it.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Portable_Beacon-FlavorText", "Absorbs the smallest amount of light from any atmosphere and stores it in a small internal battery that can last for hundreds of years with minimal charge. The beacon offers a BYO solution.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Glassworking_Bench_V2-Description", "Tools for creating glass items and construction elements.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Glassworking_Bench_V2-FlavorText", "True glass-making originated in the Indus Valley in 1700 BCE, passing into the Mediterranean, then Africa and the rest of the world, before extending through space to Icarus in the mid 22nd century.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Kitchen_Bench-Description", "A modular workspace for cooking and concocting complex recipes.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Kitchen_Bench-FlavorText", "Prep advanced food recipes here to assist on your adventures")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Kitchen_Stove-Description", "An efficient, biofuel-powered cooking unit.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Kitchen_Stove-FlavorText", "A well-crafted, solidly insulated stove for discerning off-world chefs.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Kitchen_Storage-Description", "A compact module for all your kitchen storage needs.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Kitchen_Storage-FlavorText", "For the demanding Icarus ingredient hoarder, a small module with 40 storage slots.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Glass_Jar-Description", "A roughly made, but perfectly serviceable mason jar.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Glass_Jar-FlavorText", "This jar is empty, but like the many gaps in our understanding of this planet, is waiting to be filled.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Glass_Jar_Jam-Description", "Slightly bitter, but unsurpassed.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Glass_Jar_Jam-FlavorText", "It\'s not just jam. You hold in your hand an irreducible symbol of humanity\'s commitment to settling an alien world. Strongly increases max stamina.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Beer-Description", "Proving you can brew beer from just about anything.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Beer-FlavorText", "Warms the body, soothes the soul, increases regeneration rates.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Wine-Description", "One of humanity\'s oldest inventions.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Wine-FlavorText", "You\'re four billion kilometers from Earth, but some things never change. Wine stops the pain, increases stamina and health regen.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Platinum_Bolt-Description", "Hard-hitting, if not priceless.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Platinum_Bolt-FlavorText", "Though eclipsed by exotics, platinum remains extremely valuable, even if the market is somewhat distant.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Antibiotic_Pill-Description", "A broad-spectrum antibacterial agent, protecting against food poisoning, wound infections and cave sickness.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Antibiotic_Pill-FlavorText", "While not quite invincible, your susceptibility to microbial takeover will temporarily reach an all-time low.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Antipoison_Pill-Description", "An long-acting anti-venom to prevent poisoning.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Antipoison_Pill-FlavorText", "Ingest and ignore the risks.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Antiparastic_Pill-Description", "A potent antibacterial preparation for preventing festering wounds, dysentry and other parasites.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Antiparastic_Pill-FlavorText", "Flooding your body with antibiotics is a double-edged sword, but if it stops you needing to use the word \'festering\' to describe part of your body, it\'s worth it.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Blood_Thinning_Pill-Description", "A potent preventative for concussions and contusions.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Blood_Thinning_Pill-FlavorText", "Off-label and off-planet, this one doesn\'t come with any warnings. So it\'s probably safe.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Platinum_Spear-Description", "Priceless on Earth. An advanced survival tool on Icarus.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Platinum_Spear-FlavorText", "A midweight, short-shafted ahlspeiss spear that, composition aside, would not have looked out of place in 16th century Prussia.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Platinum_Sickle-Description", "An extremely precise, high yield harvesting tool.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Platinum_Sickle-FlavorText", "A proletariat icon made from a near-priceless material, yet no more valuable than lead when compared to exotics themselves.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Platinum_Knife-Description", "A precision blade, stronger than steel.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Platinum_Knife-FlavorText", "Platinum\'s durablity gives an incredibly accurate, lethal cutting edge.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Platinum_Hammer-Description", "Light, durable, accurate, but still a hammer.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Platinum_Hammer-FlavorText", "\"On Icarus, you\'re either the hammer, or the anvil\" - Javier Survez")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Platinum_Axe-Description", "An axceedingly reliable, accurate hewing tool.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Platinum_Axe-FlavorText", "\"Give me six hours to chop down a tree, I\'ll spend the first four sharpening the axe\" - A. Lincoln")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Platinum_Pickaxe-Description", "Strong, high-yield and extremely accurate.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Platinum_Pickaxe-FlavorText", "There is a small, but specific class of problems for which the only solution is a pickaxe.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Rifle_BoltAction-Description", "A single-shot bolt action, packs a punch.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Rifle_BoltAction-FlavorText", "Despite limited metallurgic and gunsmithing resources, First Cohort prospectors have managed to design a better-than-serviceable, true-aiming hunting rifle.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_SplineTool_Water-Description", "A tool to help create and connect Water networks.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Water_Sprinkler-Description", "Fire reduction, just add water.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Water_Sprinkler-FlavorText", "Must be connected to a water source.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Pistol_Round-Description", "Reliable 9mm ammunition.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Deep_Mining_Drill_Biofuel-Description", "A biofuel-powered drill capable of mining ore trapped deep under the surface.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Deep_Mining_Drill_Biofuel-FlavorText", "Slow progress, but it\'s worth it")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Farming_CropPlot_T3-Description", "A sturdy option for farming with water intake for faster crop growth. Fully-grown crops left too long will eventually wither and only provide spoiled plants.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Farming_CropPlot_T3-FlavorText", "Can be connected to a water network")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Cave_Scanner-Description", "A scanner that can locate caves within the surrounding area. Right click to toggle audible beeping.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Cave_Scanner-FlavorText", "Making life easier, one piece of technology at a time.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Radar_Biofuel-Description", "A portable Exotics detection unit powered by Biofuel. Approximate directional arc shown on your map. Attracts animals while active.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Radar_Biofuel-FlavorText", "Powered by good old Icarus Biofuel.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Extractor_Biofuel-Description", "A portable mining unit powered by Biofuel, used to extract resources from Exotics deposits.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Extractor_Biofuel-FlavorText", "Warning: Exotics extraction is known to aggravate nearby wildlife")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Alteration_Bench-Description", "A bench with built-in drill press for crafting attachments and a workspace for altering Items.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Alteration_Bench-FlavorText", "Time to get creative.")

Melee_Attachment_Pack.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Talents", "Melee_Attachment_Pack-Description", "A small assortment of Basic Tool Attachments")
