NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Composite_Paste-Description", "A high grade ferro-organic precursor.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Flashlight-Description", "An LED flashlight for illuminating dark corners. Can be recharged in a Charging Station.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Flashlight-FlavorText", "Activate light with secondary fire.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Composite_Arrow-Description", "For power and weight, nothing compares.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Material_Processor-Description", "Swiftly craft advanced ingredients and resources.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Fabricator-Description", "A marvel of survival technology.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Fabricator-FlavorText", "Surprisingly simple for such a versatile machine, the Fabricator combines a flatbed CNC router with limited 3D alloy printing capabilities.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Compound_Bow-Description", "Lightweight, long-range lethality.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Rifle_Hunting-Description", "A semi-automatic rifle, ideal for big game hunting.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Rifle_Hunting-FlavorText", "An ancient hand-wrought weapon design, adapted to a new frontier.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Composite_Spear-Description", "Low weight, high strength, extreme damage.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Composite_Spear-FlavorText", "Bringing two thousand years of materials technology to a sharp stick, the composite spear is lethal at long range or close quarters.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Refrigerator-Description", "Greatly reduces food spoilage.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Refrigerator-FlavorText", "Very Cool. ")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Titanium_Spear-Description", "A powerful, precise combat weapon. ")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Titanium_Spear-FlavorText", "Extremely strong and lightweight, the titanium spear is a devastating hunting and protective tool in well-trained hands.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Titanium_Pickaxe-Description", "An extremely strong, lightweight mining tool.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Titanium_Axe-Description", "A savagely sharp, extremely durable hand axe.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Titanium_Knife-Description", "A blade as hard and lightweight as life itself.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Titanium_Knife-FlavorText", "Named for the Greek Titans, titanium is harder than steel, corrosion resistant and extremely light. Its only flaw is brittleness, meaning it falls short of its indestructible reputation.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Titanium_Arrow-Description", "An extremely light, strong projectile.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Titanium_Arrow-FlavorText", "Whether on Icarus or Earth, hunters continue to value skills for stealth, control and intimacy of the kill.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Titanium_Sickle-Description", "A resilient version of an antique design.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Titanium_Sickle-FlavorText", "Sharper and stronger, it swings further, delivering more resources with each swipe.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Extractor_Electric-Description", "A portable mining unit powered by Electricity, used to extract resources from Exotics deposits.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Extractor_Electric-FlavorText", "Warning: Exotics extraction is known to aggravate nearby wildlife")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Radar_Electric-Description", "A portable Exotics detection unit powered by Electricity. Approximate directional arc shown on your map. Attracts animals while active.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Radar_Electric-FlavorText", "Connect this baby up to a generator and you are good to go.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Titanium_Bolt-Description", "A high-damage projectile.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Titanium_Bolt-FlavorText", "\"When you\'ve got two tons of polar bear lumbering towards you across the ice, you suddenly realise a bullet\'s not going to cut it. But a titanium bolt through the eye, that\'s another story.\" - Sol Berlinski")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Kit_Generator-Description", "An efficient, if basic biofuel-driven electric generator.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Kit_Generator-FlavorText", "Literally or figuratively, we\'ve come a long way from the Faraday Disc.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_WaterWheel_Generator-Description", "A combined wheel and generator, turns fluid motion into angular momentum.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_WaterWheel_Generator-FlavorText", "Still one of humanity\'s greatest ideas.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_SplineTool_Electricity-Description", "A tool to help create and connect Electricity networks.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Water_Pump-Description", "A small, but powerful axial-flow pump useful for creating water networks.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Masonry_Bench_T4-Description", "Powered bench for heavy stonework and carving.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Carpentry_Bench_T4-Description", "Powered workbench and machine tools for advanced woodworking.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Chemistry_Bench-Description", "A rough but effective laboratory.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Chemistry_Bench-FlavorText", "Unlikely to win anyone a Nobel Prize, but sufficient for the average Icarus alchemist.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Electric_Armor_Bench-Description", "Powered workbench for advanced textiles production and maintenance.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Heater_Large-Description", "A powered heating device for warming larger areas.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Heater_Large-FlavorText", "Entropy is your friend.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Cooler_Large-Description", "A powered heat exchange unit for cooling larger areas.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Cooler_Large-FlavorText", "Stay frosty.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Composter_Electric-Description", "Advanced biofuel unit for accelerated production.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Composter_Electric-FlavorText", "An upshot of the Climate Emergency was a focus on efficient, sustainable technology that squeezes every ounce of energy from nature.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Advanced_Kitchen_Bench-Description", "A full food preparation area.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Advanced_Kitchen_Bench-FlavorText", "Cleaner and more durable than other benches on Icarus. ")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Advanced_Kitchen_Storage-Description", "The best cabinets this planet can offer.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Advanced_Kitchen_Storage-FlavorText", "Can never have enough storage.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Electric_Stove-Description", "A swifter, safer cooking system.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Electric_Stove-FlavorText", "Less explosive than using home made biofuel.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Advanced_Kitchen_Sink-Description", "Fully plumbed basin and running water, a luxury of sorts.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Advanced_Kitchen_Sink-FlavorText", "Just like home.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Worklamp_OmniDirectional-Description", "A fluorescent lamp for illuminating a large area.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Worklamp_OmniDirectional-FlavorText", "The traditional workshop workhorse.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Electric_Dehumidier_V2-Description", "Diminishes such health risks as cave sickness, while also seeming to dispel cave worms.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Electric_Dehumidier_V2-FlavorText", "Whether cave worms are offended by the sudden aridity it produces, or the high pitched whine, research is yet to confirm.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Basic_Ceiling_Light-Description", "A bunker-style lamp, providing wide illumination, needing power.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Basic_Ceiling_Light-FlavorText", "\"We forgive children who are afraid of the dark. The tragedy is adults afraid of the light.\" - Plato")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Titanium_Hammer-Description", "A durable and reliable tool for structure repair.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Titanium_Hammer-FlavorText", "Counter the forces of nature with a little violence of your own.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Deep_Mining_Drill_Electric-Description", "A convenient drilling device that runs on electricity.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Deep_Mining_Drill_Electric-FlavorText", "Set it and forget it")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Farming_CropPlot_T4-Description", "An advanced option for the busy farmer. Supports inputs from both Power and Water networks for increased crop growth speed. Fully-grown crops left too long will eventually wither and only provide spoiled plants.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Farming_CropPlot_T4-FlavorText", "Can be connected to both a water and a power network")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Speed_Fertilizer-Description", "Helps your crops to grow faster")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Speed_Fertilizer-FlavorText", "Reach for the sky")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Yield_Fertilizer-Description", "Increases the yield of your crops")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Yield_Fertilizer-FlavorText", "Fertilizer is a multivitamin for your plants")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_DeepOre_Scanner-Description", "A scanner that can locate various deep ore deposits within the surrounding area")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_DeepOre_Scanner-FlavorText", "A truly remarkable piece of equipment.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Vapour_Condenser-Description", "Can be placed over Enzyme Geysers across Icarus to condense vapor into exotics or condensed enzymes. WARNING: Attracts creatures while active.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Vapour_Condenser-FlavorText", "Pretty high tech, considering it was created on planet.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Advanced_Atleration_Bench-Description", "A bench with a 3d printer to create any attachment. Allows faster altering of items than the basic Alteration Bench.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Advanced_Atleration_Bench-FlavorText", "Think outside the box.")

Advanced_Alteration_Melee_Pack.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Talents", "Advanced_Alteration_Melee_Pack-Description", "A Small Selection of Advanced Melee Attachments")

Advanced_Armor_Attachment_Pack.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Talents", "Advanced_Armor_Attachment_Pack-Description", "A Small Selection of Advanced Armor Attachments")

Advanced_Ranged_Attachment_Pack.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Talents", "Advanced_Ranged_Attachment_Pack-Description", "A Small Selection of Advanced Ranged Weapon Attachments")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Exotic_Processor-Description", "A machine that can process Volatile Exotics into usable materials.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Exotic_Processor-FlavorText", "You probably should still keep a good distance from this thing.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Mission_Communicator_T4-Description", "An upgrade for the C0NT4CT Device that will allow access to encrypted missions.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Mission_Communicator_T4-FlavorText", "Things are getting serious now.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Titanium_Crossbow-Description", "A powerful weapon to help you tackle whatever Icarus throws at you.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Titanium_Crossbow-FlavorText", "Classier than a gun, more exciting than a bow.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Dropship_Grenade_T4-Description", "Once thrown if the landing area is determined to be valid, will call your dropship to your current location.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Dropship_Grenade_T4-FlavorText", "Made on planet with the materials at hand, lets hope it works.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Landmine-Description", "Place to Trigger and Arm.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Landmine-FlavorText", "Dangerous... Very Dangerous....")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Exotic_Harvester-Description", "A machine that harvests volatile raw exotics from trees in volcanic regions.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Exotic_Harvester-FlavorText", "A new machine for new types of Exotics!")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Advanced_Aquarium-Description", "A very fancy fish tank for keeping your favourite finned friends around, must be connected to both power and water.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Advanced_Aquarium-FlavorText", "I repeat, do NOT tap on the glass.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Thumper-Description", "Deploy and activate to unearth mineable ore. Replenishes mineable ore in the surrounding area. ")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Thumper-FlavorText", "Sure hope this doesn\'t attract anything big...")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Deep_Freeze-Description", "A freezer that preserves food but amasses ice very slowly and uses a fairly large amount of power.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Deep_Freeze-FlavorText", "Energy efficiency is important on EVERY planet.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Large_Advanced_Aquarium-Description", "A very fancy large fish tank for keeping your favourite finned friends around, must be connected to both power and water.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Large_Advanced_Aquarium-FlavorText", "The latest technology for storing your fish friends.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Shield_Titanium-Description", "A heavy-duty shield made from ultra-strong titanium, providing excellent protection against threats.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Shield_Titanium-FlavorText", "With this in hand, you\'re ready for anything.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Shield_Composites-Description", "A versatile shield made from a blend of high-tech materials, providing adaptable protection against a variety of threats.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Shield_Composites-FlavorText", "With this in hand, you\'re ready for anything.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Spawn_Blocker_T4-Description", "A handy item that creates a zone of protection, reducing the likelihood of creatures within its large radius. Requires electricity.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Spawn_Blocker_T4-FlavorText", "Note to self: Does not stop bears chasing you...")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Wind_Turbine-Description", "A rudimentary wind turbine that will generate electricity for your work.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Wind_Turbine-FlavorText", "As if the UDA ever cared about being \'environmentally friendly\'...")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Titanium_Plate-Description", "A small plate of titanium which can be used in a variety of electronics and machinery. ")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Titanium_Plate-FlavorText", "Remarkably strong when shaped.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Iron_Wood_Axe-Description", "A toxin-coated Axe that allows you to delicately extract Infected Wood when chopping trees.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Iron_Wood_Axe-FlavorText", "The miasma coating this tool emits an almost unbearable stench.")

itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Iron_Wood_Knife-FlavorText", "The miasma coating this tool emits an almost unbearable stench.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Iron_Wood_Sickle-Description", "A toxin-coated Sickle, carefully crafted using Miasma harvested from Icarus wildlife. Gives a chance to receive larger harvests.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Iron_Wood_Sickle-FlavorText", "The miasma coating this tool emits an almost unbearable stench.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Iron_Wood_Bolt-Description", "A toxin-coated Bolt, carefully crafted using Miasma harvested from Icarus wildlife.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Iron_Wood_Bolt-FlavorText", "The miasma coating this tool emits an almost unbearable stench.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Iron_Wood_Arrow-Description", "A toxin-coated Arrow, carefully crafted using Miasma harvested from Icarus wildlife.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Iron_Wood_Arrow-FlavorText", "The miasma coating this tool emits an almost unbearable stench.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Anvil_Bench_T4-Description", "An impressive foundry powered by electricity for crafting various higher quality weapons and tools.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Anvil_Bench_T4-FlavorText", "The UDA states that it has been at least seven days since the last accident using this piece of equipment...")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Shroud_Light-Description", "A handy shrouded light that gives off a cozy glow.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Shroud_Light-FlavorText", "Save power, save lives.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Spotlight-Description", "A high intensity spotlight.")
NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Water_Purifier_T4-Description", "A water purifier that can refill bottles for you automatically.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Water_Purifier_T4-FlavorText", "Hydrate!")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Battery_Shelf_T3-Description", "A rack of batteries that can supply power to your network.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Battery_Shelf_T3-FlavorText", "Do not lick.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Battery_Shelf_T4-Description", "A rack of high-capacity batteries that can supply power to your network.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Battery_Shelf_T4-FlavorText", "Do not lick.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Yield_Fertilizer-Description", "Increases the yield of your crops")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Yield_Fertilizer-FlavorText", "Fertilizer is a multivitamin for your plants")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Turret_Pistol-Description", "A turret that uses pistol ammunition to defend its surroundings. Fires a steady shots at a medium range. Power consumption reduced when idle.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Turret_Pistol-FlavorText", "This design is marked as \"experimental\" by the Lagos Group - The UDA is not liable for any injuries caused by this unit.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Titanium_Shovel-Description", "Can be used to dig dirt mounds on dirt or grass, or shovel snow off your roof. Provides moderate storm resistance to your crops.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Titanium_Shovel-FlavorText", "Shift snow, or bury a friend.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Shotgun_T4-Description", "An advanced weapon that packs a real punch.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Shotgun_T4-FlavorText", "Get off my lawn.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Enzyme_Cannon_Hub-Description", "When Connected to Power and Given Condensed Enzymes will Charge Up. After Charging can be Triggered to Force Regrow trees in a surrounding area.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Enzyme_Cannon_Hub-FlavorText", "1.21 Gigawatts!")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Flow_Meter-Description", "Connect this to any resource network for a breakdown of flow rates and devices.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Flow_Meter-FlavorText", "Thanks Sinotai")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Water_Borer-Description", "Can be placed over Enzyme Geysers across Icarus to collect & filter water from subterranean deposits.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Water_Borer-FlavorText", "H20 H20")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Marble_Corner_Bench-Description", "Can be used to make unique kitchen designs.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Marble_Corner_Bench-FlavorText", "For all your kitchen needs")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Single_Ceiling_Light-Description", "A simple caged light.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Single_Ceiling_Light-FlavorText", "A simple light for your lighting needs.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Exposed_Ceiling_Light-Description", "A classic exposed light bulb.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Exposed_Ceiling_Light-FlavorText", "A simple light for your lighting needs.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Electric_Oxite_Dissolver-Description", "Through a process of Electrolysis, oxygen is extracted from water. ")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Electric_Oxite_Dissolver-FlavorText", "Fresh air not polluted by poisonous Icarus gasses.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Exposed_Ceiling_Light_Foggy-Description", "A frosted-style light bulb.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Exposed_Ceiling_Light_Foggy-FlavorText", "A simple light for your lighting needs.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Vitamins-Description", "Provides resistance to many of the afflictions on Icarus.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Vitamins-FlavorText", "One a day keeps the doctor away.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_LightningRod_Platinum-Description", "Channels lightning strikes safely toward the ground, saving structures from fiery destruction. Can be connected to a power network to charge batteries when struck.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_LightningRod_Platinum-FlavorText", "The effect of Minos\'s gravitational tides on the atmosphere creates extraordinarily powerful electrical storms, making these devices indispensible.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Charging_Device-Description", "Charges basic battery powered devices when they are placed inside.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Charging_Device-FlavorText", "Gotta Love Technology")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Attachment_Sandworm_Armor-Description", "An attachment that improves physical resistance but lowers fire resistance.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Attachment_Sandworm_Armor-FlavorText", "Can be equipped to chest armor at an Alteration Bench.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Sandworm_Module-Description", "Provides advantages in Desert Environments.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Sandworm_Module-FlavorText", "A module which can grant envirosuits characteristics of the Sandworm Creature.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Attachment_AlphaWolf_Melee-Description", "An attachment that has a chance to inflict Wound and Deep Wound on hit creatures.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Attachment_AlphaWolf_Melee-FlavorText", "Can be equipped to a valid melee weapon at an Alteration Bench.")

itemDetails.description: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Black_Wolf_Module-Description", "Provides advantages in Forest Environments.")
itemDetails.flavorText: NSLOCTEXT("D_Itemable", "Item_Black_Wolf_Module-FlavorText", "A module which can grant envirosuits characteristics of the Black Wolf Creature.")
